title: Morning routine de soft life (la țară)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Bună, fetelor! Azi vă arăt morning routine-ul meu de soft life. La țară.
shots.image_prompt: holding a smartphone clipped to a small selfie ring-light and recording herself, standing in a cozy rustic village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot, looking into the camera with an excited influencer smile
shots.motion_prompt: she talks energetically to the camera with gentle head tilts and small hand gestures, warm natural smile, subtle stable body movement, framing steady

shots.voiceover: Primul pas: ne trezim la cinci, că vaca nu așteaptă like-uri.
shots.image_prompt: a proud rooster crowing on a weathered wooden fence at dawn, misty Romanian village yard behind, low close-up shot, dew and soft mist in the air
shots.motion_prompt: the rooster flaps its wings and crows, head bobbing, mist drifting slowly past, steady camera, natural farmyard motion
shots.sfx: a rooster crowing loudly at dawn with faint farmyard birds in the background

shots.line: Skincare doar cu produse organice, direct de la vaca Florica. Smântâna e noul retinol.
shots.image_prompt: holding a small ceramic jar of thick white sour cream up near her face and dabbing a little onto her cheek with a fingertip, in the village kitchen, waist-up front-facing shot, playful expression
shots.motion_prompt: she dabs a little cream on her cheek with a fingertip and smiles at the camera, playful natural head movement, subtle coherent motion

shots.voiceover: Un strat gros, fetelor. Glow natural, fără filtru.
shots.image_prompt: extreme close-up of the same small ceramic jar of thick white sour cream on a rustic wooden table, a wooden spoon scooping a thick glossy dollop, shallow depth of field
shots.motion_prompt: the wooden spoon slowly scoops a thick dollop of sour cream from the jar, the cream stretching and folding, shallow focus, slow gentle motion

sfx.prompt: soft creamy squish of a spoon scooping thick sour cream, close up

shots.line: Fit check! Ie cusută de mâna mea, batic vintage din '67. Sustainable, draga mea.
shots.image_prompt: standing on a rustic wooden village porch, proudly presenting her embroidered blouse with both hands like a fashion influencer, waist-up front-facing shot, confident playful pose
shots.motion_prompt: she presents her blouse with both hands and does a small proud turn toward the camera, then a quick wink, smooth coherent natural motion

shots.voiceover: Catwalk pe ulița mare. Parisul să stea jos.
shots.image_prompt: several plump hens strutting and scattering down a dusty village dirt lane, low ground-level wide shot framed like a fashion runway, warm dust kicking up in the golden light
shots.motion_prompt: the hens strut and scatter down the lane, wings flapping, soft dust rising, lively but coherent natural motion, steady low camera
shots.sfx: several chickens clucking and flapping their wings in a farmyard

shots.line: Și acum, un mic hot girl walk. Până la fântână, după apă. Zece mii de pași.
shots.image_prompt: carrying a wooden yoke with two empty buckets over her shoulder, a sunlit village path with wooden houses behind her, waist-up front-facing shot, cheerful and energetic, gesturing down the path
shots.motion_prompt: she gestures down the sunny path and takes a confident step forward with the buckets, cheerful, smooth coherent body motion

shots.voiceover: Hidratare, direct de la sursă. Fără microplastice.
shots.image_prompt: an old stone village well with a wooden bucket being drawn up on a rope, sparkling water dripping from the bucket, close-up, droplets catching the golden light
shots.motion_prompt: the wooden bucket rises steadily from the well, water sloshing and dripping, droplets sparkling, slow satisfying coherent motion
shots.sfx: an old wooden well bucket creaking on a rope with water sloshing and dripping

shots.line: Asta a fost, fetelor! Dați like, dați share, și dați la găini niște grăunțe. Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: in the cozy village kitchen, waving goodbye and blowing a kiss to the camera, waist-up front-facing shot, big warm affectionate smile
shots.motion_prompt: she waves with one hand and blows a kiss to the camera, warm affectionate smile, gentle coherent natural motion
